title: OLX India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: OLX India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Full Stack Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
